The '''MD-3''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. It was slightly [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in appearance.

This [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model was used as a pharmacist and had an extensive database of different medicines and drugs.

==Description==
Built by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]],<ref name="SWS" /> the MD-3 was a [[Class one droid/Legends|class one droid]],<ref name="Arms" /> That was a member of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]].<ref name="SWS" /> Similar in design to the [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]], another of Industrial Automaton's products,<ref name="Droids" /> the MD-3 was 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|Imperial standard meters]] high, with a cranial unit attached to a torso with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]].<ref name="FF" /> A surgical gown covered the lower half of the droid, protecting<ref name="Droids" /> the bipedal<ref name="Arms" /> droid's delicate mechanisms.<ref name="Droids" /> MD-3 droids were ambidextrous.<ref name="Arms" />

MD-series droids were usually finished in [[Color/Legends|gray]] plating, with green trim, alongside yellow [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]].<ref name="FF" /> MD-3s retailed for 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and were commonly available for purchase throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Arms" /> The torso also contained a connection socket located on the lower half to allow the droid to directly connect to a [[Computer/Legends|computer]].<ref name="Droids" />

==Role==
MD-3 droids were intended for use as pharmacists, with the ability to prepare and prescribe drugs.<ref name="SWS" />

==History==
Constructed on the [[droid factory]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]],<ref name="Droids" /> they were employed by the Empire during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Aboard the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'', an MD-3 droid was part of the [[Medical bay/Legends|sick bay]] staff, and was responsible for overseeing the pharmacy and operating the [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]]. It also assisted the MD-1 droid, consulting in laboratory matters.<ref name="FO">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref> An MD-3 droid with a faulty regulator was aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']], as part of the stock in the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Droid Shop]].<ref name="RM">[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']]</ref>

One MD-3 unit designated [[1e-XE]] assisted the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] in looking after his wounded colleague [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] had escaped from the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="MA">''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]''</ref>
